message:
fix: wire lastRefresh through CardDataContext for header-level freshness display (#3276) (#3332)

Add lastRefresh to CardLoadingStateOptions and CardDataState so cards
can report their cache timestamp through the context. CardWrapper now
reads childDataState.lastUpdated as a fallback when the lastUpdated
prop is not provided, enabling all cards that pass lastRefresh to
useCardLoadingState to automatically display "Updated Xm ago" in the
card header without needing inline RefreshIndicator components.

Updated cards: PVCStatus, GPUStatus, ClusterComparison, ChartVersions,
Weather, OpenFeatureStatus, StrimziStatus.

Fixes #3276

Signed-off-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
